title: Audit Comp | Vechain | Stargate Hayabusa Bug Bounty

audit.reason: The provided test setup is incomplete and lacks assertions to validate the functionality of the StargateHayabusa contract. Additionally, there are no tests for critical functionalities such as staking, withdrawing, and getting staked amounts.
audit.improvements: Complete the test setup by including assertions to verify the behavior of the contract. Add tests for staking, withdrawing, and getting staked amounts to ensure all functionalities work as expected.
